case_title: PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS VS. ZOSIMO VELASCO et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS AS TO DEFENDANT VELASCO, ZOSIMO DOES 1 TO 10,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-12-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-12-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-26-2004

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VELASCO, ZOSIMO $1,628.37 PRINCIPAL, $525.69 ATTORNEY FEES, $205.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,359.36, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
